message:
fix(tests): update policy lifecycle tests for Enforce-by-default

Tests that exercise the observe→canary→enforce lifecycle now explicitly
set initial_mode: ActiveMode::Observe since the production default was
changed to Enforce. Also fixes pre-existing DashboardMode::Legacy
assertion (default is New).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
